finding: A structurally valid and fresh deployment proof can still identify the wrong Cloudflare Pages project unless project identity is checked independently.

acceptance_rule.deployment_url: must be an immutable preview hostname under <hash>.mirror-cartographer-research.pages.dev

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
cases: expected immutable preview and canonical alias accepted

limits: The validator is not yet wired into the GitHub Actions acceptance manifest.
Hostname identity does not prove Cloudflare account ownership or successful deployment.
No live Cloudflare deployment was performed because protected credentials remain unavailable.
privacy_boundary: Contains only public repository paths, project hostname rules, and test outcomes; no credentials, private chat, or health material.
